response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ expertise in industrial automation contexts, with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocols like MQTT/OPC UA in their work history; their focus is overwhelmingly on web stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and open-source GIS tools, with only a brief early-career C++ mention in LabWindows, insufficient for a senior C++ architecture role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse domains and languages
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Proven ability to build scalable, event-driven systems and DevOps infrastructure
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/STL work in industrial or embedded contexts
Lacks exposure to required industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443-4-1)
No evidence of message brokers, MQTT, or industrial protocols like Modbus/OPC UA
